user.title: Set up EcoTracker Emulator
user.description: The mDNS service is announced as `{prefix}<MAC>`. The MAC suffix should start with the EcoTracker OUI `{oui}` for best client compatibility – a random suggestion is pre-filled. Serial and product ID are sent as TXT records.

data.mac_suffix: MAC suffix (12 hex chars, no separators)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EcoTracker Emulator
reconfigure.description: Update the announced mDNS identity. The service is republished as `{prefix}<MAC>`; the MAC suffix should keep the EcoTracker OUI `{oui}` for best client compatibility. Sensor mappings are not changed here – use the integration's *Configure* button for those.

data.mac_suffix: MAC suffix (12 hex chars, no separators)

error.invalid_mac_suffix: MAC suffix must be exactly 12 hexadecimal characters (separators are stripped automatically).
error.invalid_serial: Serial must be exactly 12 hexadecimal characters.
error.invalid_product_id: Product ID must not be empty.

abort.already_configured: This service name is already in use.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one EcoTracker Emulator instance can be configured.
abort.reconfigure_unavailable: The integration could not be reconfigured – entry not found.

init.title: Map JSON fields to sensors
init.description: For each field of the EcoTracker `/v1/json` response you can pick a Home Assistant sensor whose state will be served. If no sensor is set – or its state is unknown/unavailable – the numeric fallback is used (or the field is omitted entirely if its *Omit* checkbox is enabled). Energy counters are in watt-hours (Wh). The sensor pickers are pre-filtered by `device_class` and matching units (W/kW for power, Wh/kWh for energy); enable *Show all sensors* to disable that filter.

data.show_all_sensors: Show all sensors (disable device_class / unit filter)
data.power_omit: power – omit when no sensor value
data.powerAvg_omit: powerAvg – omit when no sensor value
data.agePower_omit: agePower – omit when no sensor value
data.powerPhase1_omit: powerPhase1 – omit when no sensor value
data.powerPhase2_omit: powerPhase2 – omit when no sensor value
data.powerPhase3_omit: powerPhase3 – omit when no sensor value
data.energyCounterOut_omit: energyCounterOut – omit when no sensor value
data.energyCounterIn_omit: energyCounterIn – omit when no sensor value
